zh.lifeSummary: 當Rebecca Craddock於大約1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可時，她的父親Richard Craddock34歲，母親Elizabeth Hutchins31歲。她於大約1662年與John Cox在美國結婚。他們至少是6個兒子的父母。她去世於1682年在她的家鄉享年53歲，埋葬在美國維吉尼亞州亨利可瓦林納亨利可 帕里什 邱奇 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Rebecca Craddock于大约1630年出生在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加維吉尼亞州亨利可时，她的父亲Richard Craddock34岁，母亲Elizabeth Hutchins31岁。她于大约1662年与John Cox在美国结婚。他们至少是6个儿子的父母。她去世于1682年在她的家乡享年53岁，埋葬在美国弗吉尼亚州亨利可瓦林納亨利可 帕里什 邱奇 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: Craddock
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Welsh and English: from the Welsh personal name Caradawc, Cradawc, Caradoc, Caradog meaning ‘amiable’, familiar in its Latin form Caractacus (but correctly Caratacus, for British Celtic Caratācos, from the stem carat- ‘dear, love’), a British prince who was taken as prisoner to Rome in about 51 AD for his leadership of a revolt against the Roman occupation.
Americanized form of German   Gredig  . Compare   Graddick  .

variants.name: Cradduck
meanings: Welsh and English (Kent): variant of   Craddock  .

variants.name: Cradick
meanings: Welsh and English: variant of   Craddock  . Compare   Cradit  .

variants.name: Craddick
meanings: English (Staffordshire) and Welsh: variant of   Craddock  .

variants.name: Cradic
meanings: Probably an altered form of   Craddock  . This surname is concentrated in TN.

variants.name: Gredig
meanings: habitational name from a place called Greding in Bavaria.

variants.name: Graddick
meanings: Possibly also an altered form of English Craddick, itself a variant of Craddock .

nameMeanings.name: Rebecca
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, from the Latin form of the Hebrew name Rebekah, borne by the wife of Isaac, who was the mother of Esau and Jacob (Genesis 24–27). The Hebrew root occurs in the Bible only in the vocabulary word marbek ‘cattle stall’, and its connection with the name is doubtful. In any case, Rebecca was Aramean, and the name probably has a source in Aramaic. It has always been common as a Jewish name; in England and elsewhere it began to be used also by Christians from the 14th century onwards and especially at the time of the Reformation, when Old Testament names became popular. It was very common among the Puritans in the 17th century, and has enjoyed a tremendous vogue in England since the latter part of the 20th century, among people of many different creeds. In Scotland this is found as an Anglicized form of Beathag .

en.lifeSummary: When Rebecca Craddock was born about 1630, in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, her father, Richard Craddock, was 34 and her mother, Elizabeth Hutchins, was 31. She married John Cox about 1662, in United States. They were the parents of at least 6 sons. She died in 1682, in her hometown, at the age of 53, and was buried in Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginia, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Rebecca Craddock est née environ 1630, à Henrico, Virginie, Amérique coloniale britannique, son père, Richard Craddock, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Hutchins, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé John Cox environ 1662, à États-Unis. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils. Elle est décédée en 1682, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterrée à Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginie, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Rebecca Craddock um 1630 in Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Craddock 34 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Hutchins 31. Sie hat um 1662 in Vereinigte Staaten John Cox geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne. Sie starb 1682 im Alter von 53 Jahren in ihrem Geburtsort und wurde in Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginia, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

ko.lifeSummary: Rebecca Craddock(이)가 대략 1630년 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 버지니아 주 헨리코에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Craddock(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Hutchins(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 대략 1662년 미국에서 John Cox(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1682년 그녀의 고향에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 버지니아 주 헨리코 바리나 헨리코 파리시 c후르치 세멧리에 묻혔다.

Ela casou-se com John Cox aproximadamente 1662, em Estados Unidos da América. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos. ru.lifeSummary: Когда Rebecca Craddock родилась около 1630 г. в местности хенрику, Виргиния, бритиш колоняль амирика, её отцу по имени Richard Craddock было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Hutchins, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Cox около 1662 г. в местности Соединенные штаты. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей. Она умерла в 1682 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 53 лет и была похоронена в местности хенрику пэриш чурч кеметири, варина, хенрику, Вирджиния, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Rebecca Craddock nació aproximadamente 1630, en Henrico, Virginia, British Colonial America, su papá, Richard Craddock, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Hutchins, tenía 31 años. Se casó con John Cox aproximadamente 1662, en Estados Unidos. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos. Murió en 1682, en su pueblo, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultada en Henrico Parish Church Cemetery, Varina, Henrico, Virginia, Estados Unidos.
